findings.detail: LR before/gate/after flow reads cleanly. Four provider-obligation nodes feed the conformity-assessment diamond; diamond visibly a pass/fail decision point; three ongoing-duty nodes flow out after launch. No overlaps, no truncation, subtitles legible at 1400px, color tiers correct (provider=auto purple, gate=hitl yellow, ongoing=done green).

SOFT/non-blocking: the three 'pass — placed on market' edge labels are identical and repetitive, but none collide with a node or each other — each sits on its own edge. Reads as reinforcement of the gate->market transition rather than a defect. Not revised.

preflight.concept_fidelity: all 8 nodes trace to corpus section 5.2 (risk management, technical documentation, data governance, testing/robustness, conformity assessment, record-keeping, human oversight, transparency to deployers)
preflight.scope_creep: none — no 5.7 tier nodes, no Article numbers, no NIST/EO/India

stats.layout: flowchart LR (path-to-market, before-subgraph -> gate diamond -> after-subgraph)
